en_title: After the Avengers Fall, Marvel Will Introduce the Maximum X-Men | Comic Con 2026
cn_title: 复仇者联盟陨落后，漫威将推出《Maximum X-Men》
subtitle: X战警接手守护世界

paragraphs.en: Marvel Comics continues to tease a major shake-up for the Avengers franchise thanks to Avengers: Armageddon, a series that is said to be as important to Earth's Mightiest Heroes as 2004's Avengers: Disassembled. This new series will leave the Avengers broken and reeling, but the world will still need heroes. And it seems the X-Men are being tapped to fill that void.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威漫画继续预告《复仇者联盟：决战》将给复仇者联盟系列带来重大变局。据称，这部系列对地球最强英雄的重要性堪比2004年的《复仇者联盟：解散》。新系列会让复仇者联盟分崩离析、元气大伤，但世界仍需要英雄，而X战警似乎将被选中填补空缺。

paragraphs.en: During their Avengers: Armageddon panel at SDCC 2026 today, Marvel revealed a new ongoing series called Maximum X-Men. Spinning out of the events of Armageddon, Maximum X-Men sees Storm spearhead a new team that includes Wolverine, Colossus, Bishop, Iceman, Psylocke, Firestar, and Justice. Their goal is to defend the globe and fill the void left by the Avengers.
paragraphs.cn: 在今天SDCC 2026的《复仇者联盟：决战》专题活动上，漫威公布了全新连载系列《Maximum X-Men》。该作延续《决战》的事件，由风暴女率领一支新队伍，成员包括金刚狼、钢力士、毕肖普、冰人、灵蝶、火星和Justice。他们的目标是守护全球，填补复仇者联盟留下的空缺。

paragraphs.en: Maximum X-Men is written by Chris Yost (X-Force) and drawn by Tony Daniel (X-Men). Here's the official description of the new series:
paragraphs.cn: 《Maximum X-Men》由Chris Yost（《X-Force》）编剧、Tony Daniel（《X战警》）作画。新系列的官方简介如下：[原文此处缺失内容]

paragraphs.en: Maximum X-Men #1 will be released in December 2026.

Also during the panel, Marvel revealed new cover art and details for several Avengers-centric titles releasing this fall. Most intriguingly, we saw a new teaser drawn by Avengers artist Chip Zdarsky that teases a big role for The Punisher in the second arc of that upcoming series. We also learned that Joshua Williamson's Iron Man will start double-shipping in December as it kicks off parallel storylines called "Incarcerated Iron Man" and "War Machines." You can see all the new art revealed in the slideshow gallery below:
paragraphs.cn: 活动期间，漫威还公布了多部今秋发行、以复仇者联盟为核心的作品的新封面和细节。最引人注意的是，《复仇者联盟》画师Chip Zdarsky绘制的新预告暗示，惩罚者将在该系列第二个故事篇章中扮演重要角色。我们还得知，Joshua Williamson创作的《钢铁侠》将从12月起每月发行两期，同时展开名为「被囚禁的钢铁侠」和「战争机器」的平行故事线。所有新公开的图片可在下方幻灯片图库中查看。

paragraphs.en: In other Comic-Con news, Oni Press revealed the first new Scott Pilgrim comic in 16 years , and we got an exclusive first look at Hasbro's The Legend of Zelda figures .
paragraphs.cn: 其他Comic-Con消息方面，Oni Press公布了16年来首部全新的《歪小子斯科特》漫画，我们也独家抢先看到了孩之宝的《塞尔达传说》人偶。

summary: 漫威公布全新连载《Maximum X-Men》：在《复仇者联盟：决战》导致复仇者联盟分崩离析后，风暴女将率领金刚狼、钢力士、毕肖普等X战警成员守护世界。首期于2026年12月发售。
opus_summary: 复仇者联盟在《决战》后倒下，世界的守护重任将落到X战警肩上。风暴女集结金刚狼、钢力士、冰人等角色组成新队伍，《Maximum X-Men》将于今年12月正式开启。
